hooks.command:
echo '## RASHK Phase 0: Design & Research
Use /phase-check for status, /research for questions, /adr-create for decisions.
Master plan: docs/MASTER_PLAN.md'

echo '## Context Restored
- Project: RASHK (decentralized OS for work)
- Phase: 0 (Design & Research)
- RUSVEL source: /Users/bm/rusvel (existing app, 50 crates)
- Master plan: docs/MASTER_PLAN.md
- Use pnpm (not npm), uv (not pip), cargo for Rust'
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q 'rashk-core/src/ports.rs' && echo 'WARNING: Editing the constitution (ports.rs). Ensure changes pass /port-audit.' >&2 || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '\.rs$' && jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | xargs rustfmt --edition 2024 2>/dev/null || true
